app.name: Nintendont ARCHIPELAGO HOT DAMN
app.short_description: Gamecube Loader for ARCHIPELAGO HOT DAMN
app.long_description:
Commiters: GerbilSoft, JoostinOnline, GreyRogue, Howard, Cyan
Project website: https://github.com/LittleCube-hax/Nintendont
Nintendont allows you to run GameCube games on a Wii or Wii U from an SD or HDD device.
This version of Nintendont in particular allows you to connect to ARCHIPELAGO HOT DAMN
